body: PT Maharaksa Biru Energi Tbk (None) led the net foreign buy leaderboard with 67.02 million shares, while PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) followed with 52.57 million shares, resulting in a total transaction value of IDR 553.56 billion (approximately USD 38.5 million) across both companies. The shares of PT Maharaksa Biru Energi Tbk closed at IDR 149 per share, and PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk closed at IDR 78 per share, with both companies experiencing significant trading volumes.
title: PT Maharaksa Biru Energi and PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia lead the net foreign buy leaderboard in the Indonesian market.

body: Three bonds from distinct issuers will mature in January, including PT PP Properti Tbk (PPRO)'s IDR 163.5 billion bond on January 14, PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN)'s IDR 227 billion bond on January 27, and PT MNC Kapital Indonesia Tbk (BHIT)'s IDR 235.62 billion bond on January 29. These bond maturities will require the issuers to allocate a total of IDR 626.12 billion to compensate their investors.
title: Three bonds from distinct issuers in finance and real estate sectors to mature in January.

body: PT Indotambang Perkasa sold 2.27 billion shares of PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), reducing its stake from 23% to 19.39%, while CGS International Securities Singapore Pte Ltd increased its ownership in BIPI by 17% with an additional 32 million shares. Meanwhile, other notable transactions included PT Indocement Tunggal Prakarsa Tbk (INTP) buying back 1.26 million shares, and Ram Jethmal Punjabi increasing his stake in PT Tripar Multivision Plus Tbk (TRIP) to 70.34% with a 1.04 million share purchase.
title: Multiple investors and companies engage in significant share transactions in various Indonesian companies, including PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur, PT Metropolitan Land, and PT Bumi Resources.

body: PT Terregra Asia Energy Tbk (TGRA) plans to acquire six operational minihydro power plants for IDR 365 billion, expected to generate IDR 54 billion in annual revenue, and is also constructing five new power plants, targeting IDR 360 billion in annual revenue once completed. The company aims to recover from its financial struggles, including an undersubscribed IPO and poor investment decisions, with a strategic partner secured for a planned rights issue of 38.75 billion shares in September 2025.
title: PT Terregra Asia Energy reveals business outlook for 2025, plans to acquire six minihydro power plants and construct five others to generate revenue.

body: PT Hero Global Investment Tbk (HGII) has launched its initial public offering (IPO) to raise Rp260 billion by selling 1.3 billion shares at Rp200 per share, with plans to allocate 66.82% of the funds to develop a 25 MW hydroelectric power plant in North Sumatra. The company, which operates two mini hydro power plants and one biogas power plant, reported Rp56.5 billion in revenue and Rp26.3 billion in net profit in June 2024, with Japanese investor Shikoku Electric Power set to purchase a 25% stake in HGII through its subsidiary.
title: Hero Global Investment launches IPO to raise Rp260 billion for renewable energy expansion.

body: PT Asuransi Digital Bersama TBK (YOII) is offering 412.09 million shares through an initial public offering at a price of Rp100 per share, aiming to raise Rp41.21 billion, with 20% of proceeds allocated for application development and 80% for marketing activities. The company's shares will be offered until January 6, with distribution scheduled for January 7 and official listing on January 8, 2025, alongside PT Kentanix Supra International TBK and PT Raharja Energi Cepu TBK.
title: Yoii to Raise Rp41.21 Billion Through IPO, Allocates Funds for App Development and Marketing.

body: The Financial Services Authority (OJK) will take over the supervisory role of crypto assets from the Commodity Futures Trading Regulatory Agency on January 10, 2025, following the publication of required regulations, with the government regulation bill expected to be passed soon. The transition of Bappebti from the Ministry of Trading to OJK is expected to be smooth, with no major challenges anticipated, and existing licenses and licensing processes will continue without interruption.
title: Indonesian Financial Services Authority to Take Over Crypto Asset Supervision from Commodity Futures Trading Regulatory Agency in 2025

body: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI) plans to increase its capital by issuing 500 million new shares through a private placement, which could raise up to IDR 3.14 trillion, with existing shareholders potentially diluted by 5%-1.82%. The company will seek approval from its shareholders on January 6, 2025, and the private placement will take place gradually over a maximum of 2 years, with no confirmed standby buyer for the new shares.
title: PT Transcoal Pacific to issue 500 million new shares through private placement, potentially raising IDR 3.14 trillion.

body: The Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) rose 1.18% or 83.3 points to close at 7,163.21 on Thursday, driven by foreign investors' offloading activities, with a net foreign sell of IDR 245.69 billion (USD 15.13 million). PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia Tbk (BBRI) led the gainers, contributing 20 points to the JCI's rise, while PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) led the decliners, dragging the JCI down by 3.50 points.
title: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index Rises 1.18% to 7,163.21 on First Trading Day of the Year.
